```diff
  "use client";
  
- import React, { useState } from "react";
+ import React, { useState, useEffect } from "react";

- import { SpeechToTextEvaluation } from "@/components/evaluations/SpeechToTextEvaluation";
+ import { sttProviders } from "@/components/agent-tabs/constants/providers";
+ 
+ type STTJob = {
+   uuid: string;
+   type: string;
+   status: "queued" | "in_progress" | "done" | "failed";
+   details: {
+     audio_paths: string[];
+     texts: string[];
+     providers: string[];
+     language: string;
+   };
+   created_at: string;
+   updated_at: string;
+ };
+ 
+ // Helper function to map provider value back to label
+ const getProviderLabel = (value: string): string =&gt; {
+   const provider = sttProviders.find((p) =&gt; p.value === value);
+   return provider ? provider.label : value;
+ };
  
  export default function STTPage() {
    const router = useRouter();
+   const { data: session } = useSession();
+   const backendAccessToken = (session as any)?.backendAccessToken;
    const [sidebarOpen, setSidebarOpen] = useState(true);
+   const [jobs, setJobs] = useState&lt;STTJob[]&gt;([]);
+   const [isLoading, setIsLoading] = useState(true);
+   const [error, setError] = useState&lt;string | null&gt;(null);
+   const [sortOrder, setSortOrder] = useState&lt;"asc" | "desc"&gt;("desc");
+ 
+   // Fetch STT jobs
+   useEffect(() =&gt; {
+     const fetchJobs = async () =&gt; {
+       if (!backendAccessToken) return;
+ 
+       try {
+         setIsLoading(true);
+         setError(null);
+         const backendUrl = process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL;
+         if (!backendUrl) {
+           throw new Error("BACKEND_URL environment variable is not set");
+         }
+ 
+         const response = await fetch(&#96;${backendUrl}/jobs?job_type=stt&#96;, {
+           method: "GET",
+           headers: {
+             accept: "application/json",
+             "ngrok-skip-browser-warning": "true",
+             Authorization: &#96;Bearer ${backendAccessToken}&#96;,
+           },
+         });
+ 
+         if (response.status === 401) {
+           await signOut({ callbackUrl: "/login" });
+           return;
+         }
+ 
+         if (!response.ok) {
+           throw new Error("Failed to fetch STT jobs");
+         }
+ 
+         const data = await response.json();
+         setJobs(data.jobs || []);
+       } catch (err) {
+         console.error("Error fetching STT jobs:", err);
+         setError(
+           err instanceof Error ? err.message : "Failed to load STT jobs"
+         );
+       } finally {
+         setIsLoading(false);
+       }
+     };
+ 
+     fetchJobs();
+   }, [backendAccessToken]);
+ 
+   const formatStatus = (status: string) =&gt; {
+     switch (status.toLowerCase()) {
+       case "in_progress":
+         return "Running";
+       case "done":
+         return "Done";
+       case "queued":
+         return "Queued";
+       case "failed":
+         return "Failed";
+       default:
+         return status;
+     }
+   };
+ 
+   const getStatusBadgeClass = (status: string) =&gt; {
+     switch (status.toLowerCase()) {
+       case "done":
+       case "completed":
+         return "bg-green-100 text-green-700 dark:bg-green-500/20 dark:text-green-400";
+       case "running":
+       case "in_progress":
+         return "bg-yellow-100 text-yellow-700 dark:bg-yellow-500/20 dark:text-yellow-400";
+       case "failed":
+       case "error":
+         return "bg-red-100 text-red-700 dark:bg-red-500/20 dark:text-red-400";
+       case "pending":
+       case "queued":
+         return "bg-gray-200 text-gray-700 dark:bg-gray-500/20 dark:text-gray-400";
+       default:
+         return "bg-gray-200 text-gray-700 dark:bg-gray-500/20 dark:text-gray-400";
+     }
+   };
+ 
+   const formatDate = (dateString: string): string =&gt; {
+     try {
+       const date = new Date(dateString.replace(" ", "T"));
+       return date.toLocaleString("en-US", {
+         month: "short",
+         day: "numeric",
+         year: "numeric",
+         hour: "numeric",
+         minute: "2-digit",
+         hour12: true,
+       });
+     } catch {
+       return dateString;
+     }
+   };
+ 
+   const formatLanguage = (language: string): string =&gt; {
+     return language.charAt(0).toUpperCase() + language.slice(1);
+   };
+ 
+   // Toggle sort order
+   const toggleSort = () =&gt; {
+     setSortOrder(sortOrder === "asc" ? "desc" : "asc");
+   };
+ 
+   // Sort jobs by updated_at
+   const sortedJobs = [...jobs].sort((a, b) =&gt; {
+     const dateA = new Date(
+       (a.updated_at || a.created_at || "").replace(" ", "T")
+     ).getTime();
+     const dateB = new Date(
+       (b.updated_at || b.created_at || "").replace(" ", "T")
+     ).getTime();
+     if (isNaN(dateA) || isNaN(dateB)) {
+       return sortOrder === "asc"
+         ? (a.updated_at || "").localeCompare(b.updated_at || "")
+         : (b.updated_at || "").localeCompare(a.updated_at || "");
+     }
+     return sortOrder === "asc" ? dateA - dateB : dateB - dateA;
+   });
```

```diff
+               &lt;/div&gt;
+               &lt;div className="text-sm font-medium text-muted-foreground"&gt;
+                 Samples
+               &lt;/div&gt;
+               &lt;div className="text-sm font-medium text-muted-foreground"&gt;
+                 &lt;button
+                   onClick={toggleSort}
+                   className="flex items-center gap-2 hover:text-foreground transition-colors cursor-pointer"
+                 &gt;
+                   Updated At
+                   &lt;svg
+                     className={&#96;w-4 h-4 transition-transform ${
+                       sortOrder === "asc" ? "rotate-180" : ""
+                     }&#96;}
+                     fill="none"
+                     viewBox="0 0 24 24"
+                     stroke="currentColor"
+                     strokeWidth={2}
+                   &gt;
+                     &lt;path
+                       strokeLinecap="round"
+                       strokeLinejoin="round"
+                       d="M19.5 13.5L12 21m0 0l-7.5-7.5M12 21V3"
+                     /&gt;
+                   &lt;/svg&gt;
+                 &lt;/button&gt;
+               &lt;/div&gt;
+             &lt;/div&gt;
+             {/* Table Rows */}
+             {sortedJobs.map((job) =&gt; (
+               &lt;Link
+                 key={job.uuid}
+                 href={&#96;/stt/${job.uuid}&#96;}
+                 className="grid grid-cols-[2fr_100px_100px_80px_1fr] gap-4 px-4 py-3 border-b border-border last:border-b-0 hover:bg-muted/20 transition-colors items-center"
+               &gt;
+                 {/* Providers as pills */}
+                 &lt;div className="flex flex-wrap gap-1.5"&gt;
+                   {job.details?.providers?.map((provider) =&gt; (
+                     &lt;span
+                       key={provider}
+                       className="inline-flex items-center px-2 py-0.5 rounded-md text-xs font-medium bg-muted text-foreground"
+                     &gt;
+                       {getProviderLabel(provider)}
+                     &lt;/span&gt;
+                   )) || (
+                     &lt;span className="text-sm text-muted-foreground"&gt;—&lt;/span&gt;
+                   )}
+                 &lt;/div&gt;
+                 {/* Language */}
+                 &lt;div&gt;
+                   &lt;span className="text-sm text-foreground"&gt;
+                     {job.details?.language
+                       ? formatLanguage(job.details.language)
+                       : "—"}
+                   &lt;/span&gt;
+                 &lt;/div&gt;
+                 {/* Status */}
+                 &lt;div&gt;
+                   &lt;span
+                     className={&#96;inline-flex items-center px-2.5 py-1 rounded-md text-xs font-medium ${getStatusBadgeClass(
+                       job.status
+                     )}&#96;}
+                   &gt;
+                     {formatStatus(job.status)}
+                   &lt;/span&gt;
+                 &lt;/div&gt;
+                 {/* Samples count */}
+                 &lt;div&gt;
+                   &lt;span className="text-sm text-foreground"&gt;
+                     {job.details?.texts?.length || 0}
+                   &lt;/span&gt;
+                 &lt;/div&gt;
+                 {/* Updated At */}
+                 &lt;p className="text-sm text-muted-foreground"&gt;
+                   {job.updated_at || job.created_at
+                     ? formatDate(job.updated_at || job.created_at)
+                     : "—"}
+                 &lt;/p&gt;
+               &lt;/Link&gt;
+             ))}
+           &lt;/div&gt;
+         )}
+       &lt;/div&gt;
      &lt;/AppLayout&gt;
    );
```

</details>

</tool-use>

```diff
@@ -1,1 +1,859 @@
- 
+ "use client";
+ 
+ import React, { useState, useEffect, useRef } from "react";
+ import { useParams, useRouter } from "next/navigation";
+ import { useSession, signOut } from "next-auth/react";
+ import { AppLayout } from "@/components/AppLayout";
+ import { sttProviders } from "@/components/agent-tabs/constants/providers";
+ import {
+   LeaderboardBarChart,
+   getColorMap,
+ } from "@/components/charts/LeaderboardBarChart";
+ import { DownloadableTable } from "@/components/DownloadableTable";
+ 
+ type MetricItem =
+   | { wer: number }
+   | { string_similarity: number }
+   | { llm_judge_score: number }
+   | {
+       metric_name: string;
+       processor: string;
+       mean: number;
+       std: number;
+       values: number[];
+     };
+ 
+ type ProviderResult = {
+   provider: string;
+   success: boolean;
+   message: string;
+   metrics: MetricItem[];
+   results: Array&lt;{
+     id: string;
+     gt: string;
+     pred: string;
+     wer: string;
+     string_similarity: string;
+     llm_judge_score: string;
+     llm_judge_reasoning: string;
+   }&gt;;
+ };
+ 
+ type LeaderboardSummary = {
+   run: string;
+   count: number;
+   wer: number;
+   string_similarity: number;
+   llm_judge_score: number;
+   ttfb: number;
+   processing_time: number;
+ };
+ 
+ type EvaluationResult = {
+   task_id: string;
+   status: "queued" | "in_progress" | "done";
+   provider_results?: ProviderResult[];
+   leaderboard_summary?: LeaderboardSummary[];
+   error?: string | null;
+ };
+ 
+ // Helper function to map provider value back to label
+ const getProviderLabel = (value: string): string =&gt; {
+   const provider = sttProviders.find((p) =&gt; p.value === value);
+   return provider ? provider.label : value;
+ };
+ 
+ const formatStatus = (status: string) =&gt; {
+   switch (status.toLowerCase()) {
+     case "queued":
+       return "Queued";
+     case "in_progress":
+       return "Running";
+     case "done":
+       return "Done";
+     case "failed":
+       return "Failed";
+     default:
+       return status;
+   }
+ };
+ 
+ const getStatusBadgeClass = (status: string) =&gt; {
+   switch (status.toLowerCase()) {
+     case "done":
+     case "completed":
+       return "bg-green-100 text-green-700 dark:bg-green-500/20 dark:text-green-400";
+     case "running":
+     case "in_progress":
+       return "bg-yellow-100 text-yellow-700 dark:bg-yellow-500/20 dark:text-yellow-400";
+     case "failed":
+     case "error":
+       return "bg-red-100 text-red-700 dark:bg-red-500/20 dark:text-red-400";
+     case "pending":
+     case "queued":
+       return "bg-gray-200 text-gray-700 dark:bg-gray-500/20 dark:text-gray-400";
+     default:
+       return "bg-gray-200 text-gray-700 dark:bg-gray-500/20 dark:text-gray-400";
+   }
+ };
+ 
+ export default function STTEvaluationDetailPage() {
+   const router = useRouter();
+   const params = useParams();
+   const { data: session } = useSession();
+   const backendAccessToken = (session as any)?.backendAccessToken;
+   const taskId = params.uuid as string;
+   const [sidebarOpen, setSidebarOpen] = useState(true);
+   const [evaluationResult, setEvaluationResult] =
+     useState&lt;EvaluationResult | null&gt;(null);
+   const [isLoading, setIsLoading] = useState(true);
+   const [error, setError] = useState&lt;string | null&gt;(null);
+   const [activeTab, setActiveTab] = useState&lt;
+     "leaderboard" | "outputs" | "about"
+   &gt;("leaderboard");
+   const [activeProviderTab, setActiveProviderTab] = useState&lt;string | null&gt;(
+     null
+   );
+   const pollingIntervalRef = useRef&lt;NodeJS.Timeout | null&gt;(null);
+ 
+   // Cleanup polling interval on unmount
+   useEffect(() =&gt; {
+     return () =&gt; {
+       if (pollingIntervalRef.current) {
+         clearInterval(pollingIntervalRef.current);
+       }
+     };
+   }, []);
+ 
+   // Fetch evaluation result
+   useEffect(() =&gt; {
+     const fetchResult = async () =&gt; {
+       if (!backendAccessToken || !taskId) return;
+ 
+       try {
+         setIsLoading(true);
+         setError(null);
+         const backendUrl = process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL;
+         if (!backendUrl) {
+           throw new Error("BACKEND_URL environment variable is not set");
+         }
+ 
+         const response = await fetch(&#96;${backendUrl}/stt/evaluate/${taskId}&#96;, {
+           method: "GET",
+           headers: {
+             accept: "application/json",
+             "ngrok-skip-browser-warning": "true",
+             Authorization: &#96;Bearer ${backendAccessToken}&#96;,
+           },
+         });
+ 
+         if (response.status === 401) {
+           await signOut({ callbackUrl: "/login" });
+           return;
+         }
+ 
+         if (!response.ok) {
+           throw new Error("Failed to fetch evaluation result");
+         }
+ 
+         const result: EvaluationResult = await response.json();
+         setEvaluationResult(result);
+ 
+         // Set first provider as active tab if results exist
+         if (result.provider_results &amp;&amp; result.provider_results.length &gt; 0) {
+           setActiveProviderTab(result.provider_results[0].provider);
+         }
+ 
+         // Start polling if not done
+         if (result.status !== "done" &amp;&amp; !pollingIntervalRef.current) {
+           pollingIntervalRef.current = setInterval(() =&gt; {
+             pollTaskStatus(taskId, backendUrl);
+           }, 2000);
+         }
+       } catch (err) {
+         console.error("Error fetching evaluation result:", err);
+         setError(
+           err instanceof Error ? err.message : "Failed to load evaluation"
+         );
+       } finally {
+         setIsLoading(false);
+       }
+     };
+ 
+     fetchResult();
+   }, [taskId, backendAccessToken]);
+ 
+   const pollTaskStatus = async (taskId: string, backendUrl: string) =&gt; {
+     try {
+       const response = await fetch(&#96;${backendUrl}/stt/evaluate/${taskId}&#96;, {
+         method: "GET",
+         headers: {
+           accept: "application/json",
+           "ngrok-skip-browser-warning": "true",
+           Authorization: &#96;Bearer ${backendAccessToken}&#96;,
+         },
+       });
+ 
+       if (response.status === 401) {
+         await signOut({ callbackUrl: "/login" });
+         return;
+       }
+ 
+       if (!response.ok) {
+         throw new Error("Failed to poll task status");
+       }
+ 
+       const result: EvaluationResult = await response.json();
+       setEvaluationResult(result);
+ 
+       if (result.status === "done") {
+         if (pollingIntervalRef.current) {
+           clearInterval(pollingIntervalRef.current);
+           pollingIntervalRef.current = null;
+         }
+         // Set first provider as active tab if results exist
+         if (result.provider_results &amp;&amp; result.provider_results.length &gt; 0) {
+           setActiveProviderTab(result.provider_results[0].provider);
+         }
+       }
+     } catch (error) {
+       console.error("Error polling task status:", error);
+       if (pollingIntervalRef.current) {
+         clearInterval(pollingIntervalRef.current);
+         pollingIntervalRef.current = null;
+       }
+     }
+   };
+ 
+   // Header with back button
+   const customHeader = (
+     &lt;div className="flex items-center gap-3"&gt;
+       &lt;button
+         onClick={() =&gt; router.push("/stt")}
+         className="flex items-center justify-center w-8 h-8 rounded-md hover:bg-muted transition-colors cursor-pointer"
+         title="Back to STT evaluations"
+       &gt;
+         &lt;svg
+           className="w-5 h-5"
+           fill="none"
+           viewBox="0 0 24 24"
+           stroke="currentColor"
+           strokeWidth={2}
+         &gt;
+           &lt;path
+             strokeLinecap="round"
+             strokeLinejoin="round"
+             d="M15.75 19.5L8.25 12l7.5-7.5"
+           /&gt;
+         &lt;/svg&gt;
+       &lt;/button&gt;
+       &lt;span className="text-base font-semibold text-foreground"&gt;
+         Back to all evaluations
+       &lt;/span&gt;
+     &lt;/div&gt;
+   );
+ 
+   return (
+     &lt;AppLayout
+       activeItem="stt"
+       onItemChange={(itemId) =&gt; router.push(&#96;/${itemId}&#96;)}
+       sidebarOpen={sidebarOpen}
+       onSidebarToggle={() =&gt; setSidebarOpen(!sidebarOpen)}
+       customHeader={customHeader}
+     &gt;
+       &lt;div className="space-y-6"&gt;
+         {/* Loading State */}
+         {isLoading &amp;&amp; (
+           &lt;div className="flex items-center justify-center gap-3 py-8"&gt;
+             &lt;svg
+               className="w-5 h-5 animate-spin"
+               fill="none"
+               viewBox="0 0 24 24"
+             &gt;
+               &lt;circle
+                 className="opacity-25"
+                 cx="12"
+                 cy="12"
+                 r="10"
+                 stroke="currentColor"
+                 strokeWidth="4"
+               &gt;&lt;/circle&gt;
+               &lt;path
+                 className="opacity-75"
+                 fill="currentColor"
+                 d="M4 12a8 8 0 018-8V0C5.373 0 0 5.373 0 12h4zm2 5.291A7.962 7.962 0 014 12H0c0 3.042 1.135 5.824 3 7.938l3-2.647z"
+               &gt;&lt;/path&gt;
+             &lt;/svg&gt;
+             &lt;span className="text-muted-foreground"&gt;Loading evaluation...&lt;/span&gt;
+           &lt;/div&gt;
+         )}
+ 
+         {/* Error State */}
+         {error &amp;&amp; (
+           &lt;div className="border border-border rounded-xl p-12 flex flex-col items-center justify-center bg-muted/20"&gt;
+             &lt;p className="text-base text-red-500 mb-2"&gt;{error}&lt;/p&gt;
+             &lt;button
+               onClick={() =&gt; window.location.reload()}
+               className="text-base text-muted-foreground hover:text-foreground transition-colors cursor-pointer"
+             &gt;
+               Retry
+             &lt;/button&gt;
+           &lt;/div&gt;
+         )}
+ 
+         {/* Status Badge and Spinner - only show for queued/in_progress */}
+         {!isLoading &amp;&amp;
+           !error &amp;&amp;
+           evaluationResult &amp;&amp;
+           evaluationResult.status !== "done" &amp;&amp; (
+             &lt;div className="flex items-center gap-3"&gt;
+               &lt;span
+                 className={&#96;inline-flex items-center px-2.5 py-1 rounded-md text-xs font-medium ${getStatusBadgeClass(
+                   evaluationResult.status
+                 )}&#96;}
+               &gt;
+                 {formatStatus(evaluationResult.status)}
+               &lt;/span&gt;
+               {(evaluationResult.status === "queued" ||
+                 evaluationResult.status === "in_progress") &amp;&amp; (
+                 &lt;svg
+                   className="w-4 h-4 animate-spin text-muted-foreground"
+                   fill="none"
+                   viewBox="0 0 24 24"
+                 &gt;
+                   &lt;circle
+                     className="opacity-25"
+                     cx="12"
+                     cy="12"
+                     r="10"
+                     stroke="currentColor"
+                     strokeWidth="4"
+                   &gt;&lt;/circle&gt;
+                   &lt;path
+                     className="opacity-75"
+                     fill="currentColor"
+                     d="M4 12a8 8 0 018-8V0C5.373 0 0 5.373 0 12h4zm2 5.291A7.962 7.962 0 014 12H0c0 3.042 1.135 5.824 3 7.938l3-2.647z"
+                   &gt;&lt;/path&gt;
+                 &lt;/svg&gt;
+               )}
+             &lt;/div&gt;
+           )}
+ 
+         {/* Evaluation Results */}
+         {!isLoading &amp;&amp;
+           !error &amp;&amp;
+           evaluationResult &amp;&amp;
+           evaluationResult.status === "done" &amp;&amp; (
+             &lt;div className="space-y-4"&gt;
+               {/* Tab Navigation */}
+               &lt;div className="flex gap-2 border-b border-border"&gt;
+                 &lt;button
+                   onClick={() =&gt; setActiveTab("leaderboard")}
+                   className={&#96;px-4 py-2 text-[13px] font-medium border-b-2 transition-colors cursor-pointer ${
+                     activeTab === "leaderboard"
+                       ? "border-foreground text-foreground"
+                       : "border-transparent text-muted-foreground hover:text-foreground"
+                   }&#96;}
+                 &gt;
+                   Leaderboard
+                 &lt;/button&gt;
+                 &lt;button
+                   onClick={() =&gt; {
+                     setActiveTab("outputs");
+                     if (
+                       !activeProviderTab &amp;&amp;
+                       evaluationResult?.provider_results &amp;&amp;
+                       evaluationResult.provider_results.length &gt; 0
+                     ) {
+                       setActiveProviderTab(
+                         evaluationResult.provider_results[0].provider
+                       );
+                     }
+                   }}
+                   className={&#96;px-4 py-2 text-[13px] font-medium border-b-2 transition-colors cursor-pointer ${
+                     activeTab === "outputs"
+                       ? "border-foreground text-foreground"
+                       : "border-transparent text-muted-foreground hover:text-foreground"
+                   }&#96;}
+                 &gt;
+                   Outputs
+                 &lt;/button&gt;
+                 &lt;button
+                   onClick={() =&gt; setActiveTab("about")}
+                   className={&#96;px-4 py-2 text-[13px] font-medium border-b-2 transition-colors cursor-pointer ${
+                     activeTab === "about"
+                       ? "border-foreground text-foreground"
+                       : "border-transparent text-muted-foreground hover:text-foreground"
+                   }&#96;}
+                 &gt;
+                   About
+                 &lt;/button&gt;
+               &lt;/div&gt;
+ 
+               {/* About Tab */}
+               {activeTab === "about" &amp;&amp; (
+                 &lt;div className="space-y-6"&gt;
+                   &lt;div className="border rounded-xl overflow-hidden"&gt;
+                     &lt;table className="w-full"&gt;
+                       &lt;thead className="bg-muted/50 border-b border-border"&gt;
+                         &lt;tr&gt;
+                           &lt;th className="px-4 py-3 text-left text-[13px] font-medium text-foreground"&gt;
+                             Metric
+                           &lt;/th&gt;
+                           &lt;th className="px-4 py-3 text-left text-[13px] font-medium text-foreground"&gt;
+                             Description
+                           &lt;/th&gt;
+                           &lt;th className="px-4 py-3 text-left text-[13px] font-medium text-foreground"&gt;
+                             Preference
+                           &lt;/th&gt;
+                           &lt;th className="px-4 py-3 text-left text-[13px] font-medium text-foreground"&gt;
+                             Range
+                           &lt;/th&gt;
+                         &lt;/tr&gt;
+                       &lt;/thead&gt;
+                       &lt;tbody&gt;
+                         &lt;tr className="border-b border-border"&gt;
+                           &lt;td className="px-4 py-3 text-[13px] font-medium text-foreground"&gt;
+                             WER (Word Error Rate)
+                           &lt;/td&gt;
+                           &lt;td className="px-4 py-3 text-[13px] text-foreground"&gt;
+                             Word error rate measures the percentage of words
+                             that differ between the reference transcription and
+                             the predicted transcription.
+                           &lt;/td&gt;
+                           &lt;td className="px-4 py-3 text-[13px] text-foreground"&gt;
+                             Lower is better
+                           &lt;/td&gt;
+                           &lt;td className="px-4 py-3 text-[13px] text-foreground"&gt;
+                             0 - ∞
+                           &lt;/td&gt;
+                         &lt;/tr&gt;
+                         &lt;tr className="border-b border-border"&gt;
+                           &lt;td className="px-4 py-3 text-[13px] font-medium text-foreground"&gt;
+                             String Similarity
+                           &lt;/td&gt;
+                           &lt;td className="px-4 py-3 text-[13px] text-foreground"&gt;
+                             Measures the similarity between the reference and
+                             predicted strings using string matching algorithms.
+                           &lt;/td&gt;
+                           &lt;td className="px-4 py-3 text-[13px] text-foreground"&gt;
+                             Higher is better
+                           &lt;/td&gt;
+                           &lt;td className="px-4 py-3 text-[13px] text-foreground"&gt;
+                             0 - 1
+                           &lt;/td&gt;
+                         &lt;/tr&gt;
+                         &lt;tr className="border-b border-border"&gt;
+                           &lt;td className="px-4 py-3 text-[13px] font-medium text-foreground"&gt;
+                             LLM Judge Score
+                           &lt;/td&gt;
+                           &lt;td className="px-4 py-3 text-[13px] text-foreground"&gt;
+                             This metric is used because WER and string
+                             similarity may not provide an accurate picture. For
+                             example, when a transcript says "9" but the model
+                             predicts "nine", both might be considered correct
+                             for the agent's specific use case. The LLM judge
+                             evaluates semantic equivalence rather than exact
+                             string matching.
+                           &lt;/td&gt;
+                           &lt;td className="px-4 py-3 text-[13px] text-foreground"&gt;
+                             Higher is better
+                           &lt;/td&gt;
+                           &lt;td className="px-4 py-3 text-[13px] text-foreground"&gt;
+                             0 - 1
+                           &lt;/td&gt;
+                         &lt;/tr&gt;
+                         &lt;tr className="border-b border-border"&gt;
+                           &lt;td className="px-4 py-3 text-[13px] font-medium text-foreground"&gt;
+                             TTFB (Time To First Byte)
+                           &lt;/td&gt;
+                           &lt;td className="px-4 py-3 text-[13px] text-foreground"&gt;
+                             Time to first byte measures the latency from when a
+                             request is sent until the first byte of the response
+                             is received.
+                           &lt;/td&gt;
+                           &lt;td className="px-4 py-3 text-[13px] text-foreground"&gt;
+                             Lower is better
+                           &lt;/td&gt;
+                           &lt;td className="px-4 py-3 text-[13px] text-foreground"&gt;
+                             0 - ∞
+                           &lt;/td&gt;
+                         &lt;/tr&gt;
+                         &lt;tr className="border-b border-border last:border-b-0"&gt;
+                           &lt;td className="px-4 py-3 text-[13px] font-medium text-foreground"&gt;
+                             Processing Time
+                           &lt;/td&gt;
+                           &lt;td className="px-4 py-3 text-[13px] text-foreground"&gt;
+                             Total time taken to process the audio and generate
+                             the transcription.
+                           &lt;/td&gt;
+                           &lt;td className="px-4 py-3 text-[13px] text-foreground"&gt;
+                             Lower is better
+                           &lt;/td&gt;
+                           &lt;td className="px-4 py-3 text-[13px] text-foreground"&gt;
+                             0 - ∞
+                           &lt;/td&gt;
+                         &lt;/tr&gt;
+                       &lt;/tbody&gt;
+                     &lt;/table&gt;
+                   &lt;/div&gt;
+                 &lt;/div&gt;
+               )}
+ 
+               {/* Leaderboard Tab */}
+               {activeTab === "leaderboard" &amp;&amp; (
+                 &lt;div className="space-y-6 -mx-8 px-8 w-[calc(100vw-260px)] ml-[calc((260px-100vw)/2+50%)] relative"&gt;
+                   {evaluationResult.leaderboard_summary &amp;&amp;
+                     evaluationResult.leaderboard_summary.length &gt; 0 &amp;&amp; (
+                       &lt;&gt;
+                         &lt;DownloadableTable
+                           columns={[
+                             {
+                               key: "run",
+                               header: "Run",
+                               render: (value) =&gt; getProviderLabel(value),
+                             },
+                             { key: "count", header: "Count" },
+                             { key: "wer", header: "WER" },
+                             {
+                               key: "string_similarity",
+                               header: "String Similarity",
+                               render: (value) =&gt; value.toFixed(5),
+                             },
+                             { key: "llm_judge_score", header: "LLM Judge Score" },
+                             {
+                               key: "ttfb",
+                               header: "TTFB (s)",
+                               render: (value) =&gt; value.toFixed(5),
+                             },
+                             {
+                               key: "processing_time",
+                               header: "Processing Time (s)",
+                               render: (value) =&gt; value.toFixed(5),
+                             },
+                           ]}
+                           data={evaluationResult.leaderboard_summary}
+                           filename="stt-evaluation-leaderboard"
+                         /&gt;
+ 
+                         {/* Charts Section */}
+                         {(() =&gt; {
+                           const providerNames =
+                             evaluationResult.leaderboard_summary.map(
+                               (s) =&gt; s.run
+                             );
+                           const colorMap = getColorMap(providerNames);
+                           return (
+                             &lt;div className="space-y-6"&gt;
+                               {/* Row 1: WER and String Similarity */}
+                               &lt;div className="grid grid-cols-2 gap-6"&gt;
+                                 &lt;LeaderboardBarChart
+                                   title="WER"
+                                   data={evaluationResult.leaderboard_summary.map(
+                                     (s) =&gt; ({
+                                       label: getProviderLabel(s.run),
+                                       value: s.wer,
+                                       colorKey: s.run,
+                                     })
+                                   )}
+                                   colorMap={colorMap}
+                                 /&gt;
+                                 &lt;LeaderboardBarChart
+                                   title="String Similarity"
+                                   data={evaluationResult.leaderboard_summary.map(
+                                     (s) =&gt; ({
+                                       label: getProviderLabel(s.run),
+                                       value: s.string_similarity,
+                                       colorKey: s.run,
+                                     })
+                                   )}
+                                   colorMap={colorMap}
+                                 /&gt;
+                               &lt;/div&gt;
+ 
+                               {/* Row 2: LLM Judge Score and TTFB */}
+                               &lt;div className="grid grid-cols-2 gap-6"&gt;
+                                 &lt;LeaderboardBarChart
+                                   title="LLM Judge Score"
+                                   data={evaluationResult.leaderboard_summary.map(
+                                     (s) =&gt; ({
+                                       label: getProviderLabel(s.run),
+                                       value: s.llm_judge_score,
+                                       colorKey: s.run,
+                                     })
+                                   )}
+                                   colorMap={colorMap}
+                                 /&gt;
+                                 &lt;LeaderboardBarChart
+                                   title="TTFB (s)"
+                                   data={evaluationResult.leaderboard_summary.map(
+                                     (s) =&gt; ({
+                                       label: getProviderLabel(s.run),
+                                       value: s.ttfb,
+                                       colorKey: s.run,
+                                     })
+                                   )}
+                                   colorMap={colorMap}
+                                 /&gt;
+                               &lt;/div&gt;
+ 
+                               {/* Row 3: Processing Time */}
+                               &lt;div className="grid grid-cols-2 gap-6"&gt;
+                                 &lt;LeaderboardBarChart
+                                   title="Processing Time (s)"
+                                   data={evaluationResult.leaderboard_summary.map(
+                                     (s) =&gt; ({
+                                       label: getProviderLabel(s.run),
+                                       value: s.processing_time,
+                                       colorKey: s.run,
+                                     })
+                                   )}
+                                   colorMap={colorMap}
+                                 /&gt;
+                               &lt;/div&gt;
+                             &lt;/div&gt;
+                           );
+                         })()}
+                       &lt;/&gt;
+                     )}
+                 &lt;/div&gt;
+               )}
+ 
+               {/* Outputs Tab */}
+               {activeTab === "outputs" &amp;&amp; evaluationResult.provider_results &amp;&amp; (
+                 &lt;div className="space-y-4 -mx-8 px-8 w-[calc(100vw-260px)] ml-[calc((260px-100vw)/2+50%)] relative"&gt;
+                   {/* Provider Dropdown */}
+                   &lt;div className="flex items-center gap-3"&gt;
+                     &lt;div className="relative"&gt;
+                       &lt;select
+                         value={
+                           activeProviderTab ||
+                           (evaluationResult.provider_results.length &gt; 0
+                             ? evaluationResult.provider_results[0].provider
+                             : "")
+                         }
+                         onChange={(e) =&gt; setActiveProviderTab(e.target.value)}
+                         className="h-10 px-4 pr-10 rounded-md text-[13px] border border-border bg-background text-foreground focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-accent focus:border-transparent cursor-pointer appearance-none min-w-[180px]"
+                       &gt;
+                         {evaluationResult.provider_results.map(
+                           (providerResult) =&gt; (
+                             &lt;option
+                               key={providerResult.provider}
+                               value={providerResult.provider}
+                             &gt;
+                               {getProviderLabel(providerResult.provider)}
+                             &lt;/option&gt;
+                           )
+                         )}
+                       &lt;/select&gt;
+                       &lt;div className="absolute inset-y-0 right-0 flex items-center pr-3 pointer-events-none"&gt;
+                         &lt;svg
+                           className="w-4 h-4 text-muted-foreground"
+                           fill="none"
+                           viewBox="0 0 24 24"
+                           stroke="currentColor"
+                           strokeWidth={2}
+                         &gt;
+                           &lt;path
+                             strokeLinecap="round"
+                             strokeLinejoin="round"
+                             d="M19.5 8.25l-7.5 7.5-7.5-7.5"
+                           /&gt;
+                         &lt;/svg&gt;
+                       &lt;/div&gt;
+                     &lt;/div&gt;
+                   &lt;/div&gt;
+ 
+                   {/* Provider Content */}
+                   {(activeProviderTab ||
+                     (evaluationResult.provider_results.length &gt; 0 &amp;&amp;
+                       evaluationResult.provider_results[0].provider)) &amp;&amp; (
+                     &lt;&gt;
+                       {evaluationResult.provider_results
+                         .filter(
+                           (pr) =&gt;
+                             pr.provider ===
+                             (activeProviderTab ||
+                               (evaluationResult.provider_results &amp;&amp;
+                                 evaluationResult.provider_results[0]?.provider))
+                         )
+                         .map((providerResult) =&gt; (
+                           &lt;div
+                             key={providerResult.provider}
+                             className="space-y-6"
+                           &gt;
+                             {/* Error Message */}
+                             {!providerResult.success &amp;&amp;
+                               providerResult.message &amp;&amp; (
+                                 &lt;div className="text-[13px] text-red-500 flex items-center gap-2"&gt;
+                                   &lt;span&gt;❌&lt;/span&gt;
+                                   &lt;span&gt;{providerResult.message}&lt;/span&gt;
+                                 &lt;/div&gt;
+                               )}
+ 
+                             {/* Overall Metrics - Only show if success */}
+                             {providerResult.success &amp;&amp; (
+                               &lt;div className="border rounded-xl p-4 bg-muted/10"&gt;
+                                 &lt;h3 className="text-[15px] font-semibold mb-4"&gt;
+                                   Overall Metrics
+                                 &lt;/h3&gt;
+                                 &lt;div className="space-y-4"&gt;
+                                   {/* First Row: WER, String Similarity, LLM Judge Score */}
+                                   &lt;div className="grid grid-cols-3 gap-4"&gt;
+                                     {providerResult.metrics.map(
+                                       (metric, index) =&gt; {
+                                         if ("wer" in metric) {
+                                           return (
+                                             &lt;div key={index}&gt;
+                                               &lt;div className="text-[12px] text-muted-foreground mb-1"&gt;
+                                                 WER
+                                               &lt;/div&gt;
+                                               &lt;div className="text-[18px] font-semibold text-foreground"&gt;
+                                                 {metric.wer}
+                                               &lt;/div&gt;
+                                             &lt;/div&gt;
+                                           );
+                                         }
+                                         if ("string_similarity" in metric) {
+                                           return (
+                                             &lt;div key={index}&gt;
+                                               &lt;div className="text-[12px] text-muted-foreground mb-1"&gt;
+                                                 String Similarity
+                                               &lt;/div&gt;
+                                               &lt;div className="text-[18px] font-semibold text-foreground"&gt;
+                                                 {metric.string_similarity.toFixed(
+                                                   5
+                                                 )}
+                                               &lt;/div&gt;
+                                             &lt;/div&gt;
+                                           );
+                                         }
+                                         if ("llm_judge_score" in metric) {
+                                           return (
+                                             &lt;div key={index}&gt;
+                                               &lt;div className="text-[12px] text-muted-foreground mb-1"&gt;
+                                                 LLM Judge Score
+                                               &lt;/div&gt;
+                                               &lt;div className="text-[18px] font-semibold text-foreground"&gt;
+                                                 {metric.llm_judge_score}
+                                               &lt;/div&gt;
+                                             &lt;/div&gt;
+                                           );
+                                         }
+                                         return null;
+                                       }
+                                     )}
+                                   &lt;/div&gt;
+                                   {/* Second Row: TTFB, Processing Time */}
+                                   &lt;div className="grid grid-cols-3 gap-4"&gt;
+                                     {providerResult.metrics.map(
+                                       (metric, index) =&gt; {
+                                         if ("metric_name" in metric) {
+                                           const displayName =
+                                             metric.metric_name === "ttfb"
+                                               ? "TTFB (s)"
+                                               : metric.metric_name ===
+                                                 "processing_time"
+                                               ? "Processing Time (s)"
+                                               : metric.metric_name;
+                                           return (
+                                             &lt;div key={index}&gt;
+                                               &lt;div className="text-[12px] text-muted-foreground mb-1"&gt;
+                                                 {displayName}
+                                               &lt;/div&gt;
+                                               &lt;div className="text-[18px] font-semibold text-foreground"&gt;
+                                                 {metric.mean.toFixed(5)}
+                                               &lt;/div&gt;
+                                             &lt;/div&gt;
+                                           );
+                                         }
+                                         return null;
+                                       }
+                                     )}
+                                   &lt;/div&gt;
+                                 &lt;/div&gt;
+                               &lt;/div&gt;
+                             )}
+ 
+                             {/* Results Table */}
+                             {providerResult.results &amp;&amp;
+                               providerResult.results.length &gt; 0 &amp;&amp; (
+                                 &lt;div className="border rounded-xl overflow-visible"&gt;
+                                   &lt;div className="overflow-hidden rounded-xl"&gt;
+                                     &lt;table className="w-full"&gt;
+                                       &lt;thead className="bg-muted/50 border-b border-border"&gt;
+                                         &lt;tr&gt;
+                                           &lt;th className="px-4 py-3 text-left text-[12px] font-medium text-foreground"&gt;
+                                             ID
+                                           &lt;/th&gt;
+                                           &lt;th className="px-4 py-3 text-left text-[12px] font-medium text-foreground"&gt;
+                                             Ground Truth
+                                           &lt;/th&gt;
+                                           &lt;th className="px-4 py-3 text-left text-[12px] font-medium text-foreground"&gt;
+                                             Prediction
+                                           &lt;/th&gt;
+                                           &lt;th className="px-4 py-3 text-left text-[12px] font-medium text-foreground"&gt;
+                                             WER
+                                           &lt;/th&gt;
+                                           &lt;th className="px-4 py-3 text-left text-[12px] font-medium text-foreground"&gt;
+                                             String Similarity
+                                           &lt;/th&gt;
+                                           &lt;th className="px-4 py-3 text-left text-[12px] font-medium text-foreground"&gt;
+                                             LLM Judge Score
+                                           &lt;/th&gt;
+                                           &lt;th className="px-4 py-3 text-left text-[12px] font-medium text-foreground"&gt;
+                                             LLM Judge Reasoning
+                                           &lt;/th&gt;
+                                         &lt;/tr&gt;
+                                       &lt;/thead&gt;
+                                       &lt;tbody&gt;
+                                         {providerResult.results.map(
+                                           (result, index) =&gt; (
+                                             &lt;tr
+                                               key={index}
+                                               className="border-b border-border last:border-b-0"
+                                             &gt;
+                                               &lt;td className="px-4 py-3 text-[13px] text-foreground"&gt;
+                                                 {index + 1}
+                                               &lt;/td&gt;
+                                               &lt;td className="px-4 py-3 text-[13px] text-foreground"&gt;
+                                                 {result.gt}
+                                               &lt;/td&gt;
+                                               &lt;td className="px-4 py-3 text-[13px] text-foreground"&gt;
+                                                 {result.pred}
+                                               &lt;/td&gt;
+                                               &lt;td className="px-4 py-3 text-[13px] text-foreground"&gt;
+                                                 {result.wer}
+                                               &lt;/td&gt;
+                                               &lt;td className="px-4 py-3 text-[13px] text-foreground"&gt;
+                                                 {parseFloat(
+                                                   result.string_similarity
+                                                 ).toFixed(5)}
+                                               &lt;/td&gt;
+                                               &lt;td className="px-4 py-3 text-[13px] text-foreground"&gt;
+                                                 {result.llm_judge_score}
+                                               &lt;/td&gt;
+                                               &lt;td className="px-4 py-3 text-[13px] text-muted-foreground max-w-md"&gt;
+                                                 {result.llm_judge_reasoning}
+                                               &lt;/td&gt;
+                                             &lt;/tr&gt;
+                                           )
+                                         )}
+                                       &lt;/tbody&gt;
+                                     &lt;/table&gt;
+                                   &lt;/div&gt;
+                                 &lt;/div&gt;
+                               )}
+                           &lt;/div&gt;
+                         ))}
+                     &lt;/&gt;
+                   )}
+                 &lt;/div&gt;
+               )}
+             &lt;/div&gt;
+           )}
+       &lt;/div&gt;
+     &lt;/AppLayout&gt;
+   );
+ }
+ 
```

</details>

</tool-use>

I've completed the changes. Here's a summary of what was done:

1. **Updated `/src/app/stt/page.tsx`** - Now shows a list of all STT evaluation jobs with:
   - Providers displayed as pills
   - Language column
   - Status badge (Done, Running, Queued, Failed)
   - Number of samples (texts count)
   - Updated At column with sortable functionality
   - "New STT evaluation" button to create new evaluations
   - Empty state when no evaluations exist

2. **Created `/src/app/stt/new/page.tsx`** - A new page for creating STT evaluations that:
   - Uses the existing `SpeechToTextEvaluation` component
   - Has a back button header to return to the evaluations list

3. **Created `/src/app/stt/[uuid]/page.tsx`** - A detail page for viewing individual STT evaluation results with:
   - Back button header
   - Status badge with polling for in-progress evaluations
   - Three tabs: Leaderboard, Outputs, and About
   - Leaderboard tab shows the downloadable table and bar charts for WER, String Similarity, LLM Judge Score, TTFB, and Processing Time
   - Outputs tab shows per-provider detailed results with dropdown selector
   - About tab explains each metric

The structure now mirrors the TTS evaluation flow (`/tts`, `/tts/new`, `/tts/[uuid]`), making the user experience consistent between STT and TTS evaluations.

```diff
  ### 3. Speech-to-Text Evaluation (&#96;/stt&#96;)
  
- **What you can do:**
+ **Page Structure:**
+ 
+ - &#96;/stt&#96; - List page showing all STT evaluation jobs
+ - &#96;/stt/new&#96; - Create a new STT evaluation
+ - &#96;/stt/[uuid]&#96; - View evaluation details and results
+ 
+ **List Page (&#96;/stt&#96;):**
+ 
+ - **View all STT evaluations** in a sortable table (sorted by updated date)
+ - **Columns**: Providers (as pills), Language, Status, Samples count, Updated At
+ - **Click to view details** - opens the evaluation detail page
+ - **"New STT Evaluation" button** - navigates to the create page
+ 
+ **Create Page (&#96;/stt/new&#96;):**
  
  - **Upload audio files** (.wav format) with reference transcriptions
  - **Add multiple test samples** for batch evaluation
  - **Select providers to evaluate** (compare multiple simultaneously)
  - **Choose language** (English or Hindi)
- - **Run evaluation** and get results:
-   - **Leaderboard view** with comparative charts
-   - **Per-provider metrics**: WER, String Similarity, LLM Judge Score, TTFB, Processing Time
-   - **Detailed outputs** showing ground truth vs predictions
-   - **LLM Judge reasoning** explaining semantic accuracy
+ - **Run evaluation** - creates evaluation and redirects to detail page
+ 
+ **Detail Page (&#96;/stt/[uuid]&#96;):**
+ 
+ - **Polls for results** while status is &#96;queued&#96; or &#96;in_progress&#96;
+ - **Three tabs when done**:
+   - **Leaderboard**: Comparative table and charts
+   - **Outputs**: Per-provider results with ground truth vs predictions
+   - **About**: Metric descriptions
+ - **Metrics**: WER, String Similarity, LLM Judge Score, TTFB, Processing Time
  
  ### 4. Text-to-Speech Evaluation (&#96;/tts&#96;)
```

```diff
  ### Evaluation Page Pattern (TTS/STT)
  
- Evaluation pages follow a list → new → detail pattern similar to simulations:
+ Both TTS and STT evaluation pages follow the same list → new → detail pattern:
  
  &#96;&#96;&#96;
  /tts                    # List all TTS evaluation jobs
- /tts/new                # Create new evaluation (form + submit)
- /tts/[uuid]             # View evaluation results (polling + tabs)
+ /tts/new                # Create new TTS evaluation (form + submit)
+ /tts/[uuid]             # View TTS evaluation results (polling + tabs)
+ 
+ /stt                    # List all STT evaluation jobs
+ /stt/new                # Create new STT evaluation (form + submit)
+ /stt/[uuid]             # View STT evaluation results (polling + tabs)
  &#96;&#96;&#96;
  
  **List Page:**
- - Fetches jobs from &#96;GET /jobs?job_type=tts&#96;
+ - Fetches jobs from &#96;GET /jobs?job_type=tts&#96; or &#96;GET /jobs?job_type=stt&#96;
  - Displays in sortable table with columns: Providers (as pills), Language, Status, Samples count, Updated At
- - "New TTS Evaluation" button navigates to &#96;/tts/new&#96;
- - Clicking a row navigates to &#96;/tts/{uuid}&#96;
+ - "New [TTS/STT] Evaluation" button navigates to &#96;/[tts|stt]/new&#96;
+ - Clicking a row navigates to &#96;/[tts|stt]/{uuid}&#96;
  
  **New Page:**
- - Contains the evaluation form component (&#96;TextToSpeechEvaluation&#96;)
- - On submit: calls &#96;POST /tts/evaluate&#96;, then redirects to &#96;/tts/{uuid}&#96; using the returned &#96;task_id&#96;
+ - Contains the evaluation form component (&#96;TextToSpeechEvaluation&#96; or &#96;SpeechToTextEvaluation&#96;)
+ - On submit: calls &#96;POST /[tts|stt]/evaluate&#96;, then redirects to &#96;/[tts|stt]/{uuid}&#96; using the returned &#96;task_id&#96;
  - Has back button in custom header to return to list
  
  **Detail Page:**
- - Fetches result from &#96;GET /tts/evaluate/{uuid}&#96; (NOT from &#96;/jobs&#96;)
+ - Fetches result from &#96;GET /[tts|stt]/evaluate/{uuid}&#96; (NOT from &#96;/jobs&#96;)
  - Polls every 2 seconds while status is &#96;queued&#96; or &#96;in_progress&#96;
  - Shows loading/in-progress states during polling
  - Results are at **top level** (&#96;provider_results&#96;, &#96;leaderboard_summary&#96;) - different from &#96;/jobs&#96; API!
  - Displays results in tabs (Leaderboard, Outputs, About) when done
  - Has back button in custom header to return to list
+ 
+ **Key differences between TTS and STT:**
+ - **STT metrics**: WER, String Similarity, LLM Judge Score, TTFB, Processing Time
+ - **TTS metrics**: LLM Judge Score, TTFB, Processing Time
+ - **STT Outputs tab**: Shows Ground Truth vs Prediction text with per-sample metrics
+ - **TTS Outputs tab**: Shows text input with audio playback
  
  ### Component Patterns
```

</details>

</tool-use>

**Chunk 1**
Lines added: 50, lines removed: 1

```diff
@@ -1,1 +1,50 @@
- 
+ /**
+  * Formats a status string for display
+  */
+ export const formatStatus = (status: string): string =&gt; {
+   switch (status.toLowerCase()) {
+     case "queued":
+       return "Queued";
+     case "in_progress":
+       return "Running";
+     case "done":
+       return "Done";
+     case "completed":
+       return "Completed";
+     case "failed":
+       return "Failed";
+     default:
+       return status;
+   }
+ };
+ 
+ /**
+  * Returns Tailwind CSS classes for status badge styling
+  */
+ export const getStatusBadgeClass = (status: string): string =&gt; {
+   switch (status.toLowerCase()) {
+     case "done":
+     case "completed":
+       return "bg-green-100 text-green-700 dark:bg-green-500/20 dark:text-green-400";
+     case "running":
+     case "in_progress":
+       return "bg-yellow-100 text-yellow-700 dark:bg-yellow-500/20 dark:text-yellow-400";
+     case "failed":
+     case "error":
+       return "bg-red-100 text-red-700 dark:bg-red-500/20 dark:text-red-400";
+     case "pending":
+     case "queued":
+       return "bg-gray-200 text-gray-700 dark:bg-gray-500/20 dark:text-gray-400";
+     default:
+       return "bg-gray-200 text-gray-700 dark:bg-gray-500/20 dark:text-gray-400";
+   }
+ };
+ 
+ /**
+  * Returns true if the status indicates an active/running task
+  */
+ export const isActiveStatus = (status: string): boolean =&gt; {
+   const s = status.toLowerCase();
+   return s === "queued" || s === "in_progress" || s === "running";
+ };
+ 
```

</details>

</tool-use>

```diff
+ "use client";
+ 
+ import React from "react";
+ 
+ type BackHeaderProps = {
+   /** The text to display next to the back button */
+   label: string;
+   /** Callback when back button is clicked */
+   onBack: () =&gt; void;
+   /** Optional title for the back button tooltip */
+   title?: string;
+ };
+ 
+ /**
+  * A header component with a back button and label.
+  * Designed to be used as the &#96;customHeader&#96; prop of AppLayout.
+  */
+ export function BackHeader({ label, onBack, title }: BackHeaderProps) {
+   return (
+     &lt;div className="flex items-center gap-3"&gt;
+       &lt;button
+         onClick={onBack}
+         className="flex items-center justify-center w-8 h-8 rounded-md hover:bg-muted transition-colors cursor-pointer"
+         title={title}
+       &gt;
+         &lt;svg
+           className="w-5 h-5"
+           fill="none"
+           viewBox="0 0 24 24"
+           stroke="currentColor"
+           strokeWidth={2}
+         &gt;
+           &lt;path
+             strokeLinecap="round"
+             strokeLinejoin="round"
+             d="M15.75 19.5L8.25 12l7.5-7.5"
+           /&gt;
+         &lt;/svg&gt;
+       &lt;/button&gt;
+       &lt;span className="text-base font-semibold text-foreground"&gt;{label}&lt;/span&gt;
+     &lt;/div&gt;
+   );
+ }
+ 
```

```diff
+ "use client";
+ 
+ import React from "react";
+ import { formatStatus, getStatusBadgeClass, isActiveStatus } from "@/lib/status";
+ 
+ type StatusBadgeProps = {
+   /** The status string (e.g., "queued", "in_progress", "done", "failed") */
+   status: string;
+   /** Whether to show a spinner for active statuses (queued, in_progress) */
+   showSpinner?: boolean;
+ };
+ 
+ /**
+  * A badge component that displays a status with optional spinner for active states.
+  * Used for displaying task/job status in evaluation and simulation pages.
+  */
+ export function StatusBadge({ status, showSpinner = false }: StatusBadgeProps) {
+   const isActive = isActiveStatus(status);
+ 
+   return (
+     &lt;div className="flex items-center gap-3"&gt;
+       &lt;span
+         className={&#96;inline-flex items-center px-2.5 py-1 rounded-md text-xs font-medium ${getStatusBadgeClass(
+           status
+         )}&#96;}
+       &gt;
+         {formatStatus(status)}
+       &lt;/span&gt;
+       {showSpinner &amp;&amp; isActive &amp;&amp; (
+         &lt;svg
+           className="w-4 h-4 animate-spin text-muted-foreground"
+           fill="none"
+           viewBox="0 0 24 24"
+         &gt;
+           &lt;circle
+             className="opacity-25"
+             cx="12"
+             cy="12"
+             r="10"
+             stroke="currentColor"
+             strokeWidth="4"
+           &gt;&lt;/circle&gt;
+           &lt;path
+             className="opacity-75"
+             fill="currentColor"
+             d="M4 12a8 8 0 018-8V0C5.373 0 0 5.373 0 12h4zm2 5.291A7.962 7.962 0 014 12H0c0 3.042 1.135 5.824 3 7.938l3-2.647z"
+           &gt;&lt;/path&gt;
+         &lt;/svg&gt;
+       )}
+     &lt;/div&gt;
+   );
+ }
+ 
```

All linter errors are resolved. Let me provide a summary of the changes:

## Summary

I've created shared components to eliminate code duplication:

### New Files Created

1. **`src/lib/status.ts`** - Shared status utilities:
   - `formatStatus(status)` - Formats status strings for display (e.g., "in_progress" → "Running")
   - `getStatusBadgeClass(status)` - Returns Tailwind CSS classes for status badge styling
   - `isActiveStatus(status)` - Returns true if status indicates an active task

2. **`src/components/ui/BackHeader.tsx`** - Reusable back header component:
   - Props: `label`, `onBack`, `title` (optional)
   - Used as `customHeader` prop of `AppLayout`

3. **`src/components/ui/StatusBadge.tsx`** - Status badge with optional spinner:
   - Props: `status`, `showSpinner` (optional)
   - Displays status badge and shows spinner for active statuses when `showSpinner` is true

### Files Updated to Use Shared Components

- `src/app/tts/page.tsx` - Uses `formatStatus`, `getStatusBadgeClass` from `@/lib/status`
- `src/app/tts/new/page.tsx` - Uses `BackHeader` component
- `src/app/tts/[uuid]/page.tsx` - Uses `BackHeader` and `StatusBadge` components
- `src/app/stt/page.tsx` - Uses `formatStatus`, `getStatusBadgeClass` from `@/lib/status`
- `src/app/stt/new/page.tsx` - Uses `BackHeader` component
- `src/app/stt/[uuid]/page.tsx` - Uses `BackHeader` and `StatusBadge` components
- `src/components/simulation-tabs/SimulationRunsTab.tsx` - Uses shared status utilities
- `src/app/simulations/[uuid]/runs/[runId]/page.tsx` - Uses shared status utilities
- `src/components/ui/index.ts` - Exports the new components

```diff
  &lt;SpinnerIcon className="w-5 h-5 animate-spin" /&gt;

+ &#96;&#96;&#96;
+ 
+ ### Status Utilities (&#96;@/lib/status&#96;)
+ 
+ Centralized status formatting and styling:
+ 
+ &#96;&#96;&#96;tsx
+ import { formatStatus, getStatusBadgeClass, isActiveStatus } from "@/lib/status";
+ 
+ // Format status for display
+ formatStatus("in_progress");  // "Running"
+ formatStatus("queued");       // "Queued"
+ formatStatus("done");         // "Done"
+ formatStatus("failed");       // "Failed"
+ 
+ // Get badge CSS classes (theme-aware)
+ getStatusBadgeClass("done");        // "bg-green-100 text-green-700 dark:bg-green-500/20 dark:text-green-400"
+ getStatusBadgeClass("in_progress"); // "bg-yellow-100 text-yellow-700 dark:bg-yellow-500/20 dark:text-yellow-400"
+ getStatusBadgeClass("failed");      // "bg-red-100 text-red-700 dark:bg-red-500/20 dark:text-red-400"
+ getStatusBadgeClass("queued");      // "bg-gray-200 text-gray-700 dark:bg-gray-500/20 dark:text-gray-400"
+ 
+ // Check if status indicates an active task (for showing spinners)
+ isActiveStatus("queued");      // true
+ isActiveStatus("in_progress"); // true
+ isActiveStatus("done");        // false
  &#96;&#96;&#96;
```

```diff
+   - Pass &#96;showSpinner&#96; prop to show spinner for active statuses (&#96;queued&#96;/&#96;in_progress&#96;)
```

```diff
  - Contains the evaluation form component (&#96;TextToSpeechEvaluation&#96; or &#96;SpeechToTextEvaluation&#96;)
  - On submit: calls &#96;POST /[tts|stt]/evaluate&#96;, then redirects to &#96;/[tts|stt]/{uuid}&#96; using the returned &#96;task_id&#96;
- - Has back button in custom header to return to list
+ - Uses &#96;BackHeader&#96; component for back navigation to list page
  
  **Detail Page:**
  - Fetches result from &#96;GET /[tts|stt]/evaluate/{uuid}&#96; (NOT from &#96;/jobs&#96;)
  - Polls every 2 seconds while status is &#96;queued&#96; or &#96;in_progress&#96;
  - Shows loading/in-progress states during polling
+ - Uses &#96;BackHeader&#96; component for back navigation
+ - Uses &#96;StatusBadge&#96; component with &#96;showSpinner&#96; for status display
  - Results are at **top level** (&#96;provider_results&#96;, &#96;leaderboard_summary&#96;) - different from &#96;/jobs&#96; API!
  - Displays results in tabs (Leaderboard, Outputs, About) when done
- - Has back button in custom header to return to list
  
  **Key differences between TTS and STT:**
```
