-                       d="M14.74 9l-.346 9m-4.788 0L9.26 9m9.968-3.21c.342.052.682.107 1.022.166m-1.022-.165L18.16 19.673a2.25 2.25 0 01-2.244 2.077H8.084a2.25 2.25 0 01-2.244-2.077L4.772 5.79m14.456 0a48.108 48.108 0 00-3.478-.397m-12 .562c.34-.059.68-.114 1.022-.165m0 0a48.11 48.11 0 013.478-.397m7.5 0v-.916c0-1.18-.91-2.164-2.09-2.201a51.964 51.964 0 00-3.32 0c-1.18.037-2.09 1.022-2.09 2.201v.916m7.5 0a48.667 48.667 0 00-7.5 0"
-                     /&gt;
-                   &lt;/svg&gt;
-                 &lt;/button&gt;
-               )}
-             &lt;/div&gt;
-           );
-         })}
-       &lt;/div&gt;
- 
-       {/* Add Row Button */}
-       &lt;button
-         onClick={addRow}
-         className="w-full h-10 px-4 rounded-md text-[13px] font-medium border border-dashed border-border bg-muted/20 hover:bg-muted/40 transition-colors flex items-center justify-center gap-2 text-muted-foreground hover:text-foreground cursor-pointer"
-       &gt;
-         &lt;svg
-           className="w-4 h-4"
-           fill="none"
-           viewBox="0 0 24 24"
-           stroke="currentColor"
-           strokeWidth={1.5}
-         &gt;
-           &lt;path
-             strokeLinecap="round"
-             strokeLinejoin="round"
-             d="M12 4.5v15m7.5-7.5h-15"
-           /&gt;
-         &lt;/svg&gt;
-         Add another sample
-       &lt;/button&gt;
- 
-       {/* Provider Selection */}
-       &lt;div className="pt-4 space-y-3"&gt;
-         &lt;div className="flex items-center gap-2"&gt;
-           &lt;h3 className="text-[13px] font-medium text-foreground"&gt;
-             Select providers to evaluate
-           &lt;/h3&gt;
-           &lt;span className="text-[12px] text-muted-foreground"&gt;
-             ({selectedProviders.size} selected)
-           &lt;/span&gt;
-           &lt;button
-             onClick={toggleAllProviders}
-             className="ml-auto text-[12px] font-medium text-muted-foreground hover:text-foreground transition-colors cursor-pointer"
-           &gt;
-             {selectedProviders.size === providerLabels.length
-               ? "Deselect all"
-               : "Select all"}
+ import { useState, useRef } from "react";
+ import { useRouter } from "next/navigation";
+ import { useSession, signOut } from "next-auth/react";
+ import { sttProviders } from "../agent-tabs/constants/providers";
+ 
+ type AudioTextRow = {
+   id: string;
+   audioFile: File | null;
+   text: string;
+   s3Path: string | null;
+ };
+ 
+ type EvaluationResult = {
+   task_id: string;
+   status: "queued" | "in_progress" | "done";
+ };
+ 
+ type TabType = "settings" | "input";
+ 
+ // Use provider labels for display
+ const providerLabels = sttProviders.map((p) =&gt; p.label);
+ 
+ export function SpeechToTextEvaluation() {
+   const router = useRouter();
+   const { data: session } = useSession();
+   const backendAccessToken = (session as any)?.backendAccessToken;
+   const [activeTab, setActiveTab] = useState&lt;TabType&gt;("settings");
+   const [rows, setRows] = useState&lt;AudioTextRow[]&gt;([
+     { id: "1", audioFile: null, text: "", s3Path: null },
+   ]);
+   const [deleteDialogOpen, setDeleteDialogOpen] = useState&lt;string | null&gt;(null);
+   const [invalidRowIds, setInvalidRowIds] = useState&lt;Set&lt;string&gt;&gt;(new Set());
+   const [selectedProviders, setSelectedProviders] = useState&lt;Set&lt;string&gt;&gt;(
+     new Set(providerLabels)
+   );
+   const [language, setLanguage] = useState&lt;"english" | "hindi"&gt;("english");
+   const [uploadStatus, setUploadStatus] = useState&lt;{
+     [key: string]: "uploading" | "success" | "error";
+   }&gt;({});
+   const [isEvaluating, setIsEvaluating] = useState(false);
+   const fileInputRefs = useRef&lt;{ [key: string]: HTMLInputElement | null }&gt;({});
+ 
+   const addRow = () =&gt; {
+     // Validate existing rows
+     const invalidIds = new Set&lt;string&gt;();
+     rows.forEach((row) =&gt; {
+       if (!row.audioFile || !row.text.trim() || !row.s3Path) {
+         invalidIds.add(row.id);
+       }
+     });
+ 
+     if (invalidIds.size &gt; 0) {
+       // Highlight invalid rows
+       setInvalidRowIds(invalidIds);
+       return; // Don't add new row if validation fails
+     }
+ 
+     // Clear validation errors and add new row
+     setInvalidRowIds(new Set());
+     const newId = Date.now().toString();
+     setRows([...rows, { id: newId, audioFile: null, text: "", s3Path: null }]);
+   };
+ 
+   const deleteRow = (id: string) =&gt; {
+     if (rows.length === 1) return; // Don't allow deleting the last row
+     setRows(rows.filter((row) =&gt; row.id !== id));
+     setDeleteDialogOpen(null);
+   };
+ 
+   const handleFileChange = async (id: string, file: File | null) =&gt; {
+     if (!file) {
+       setRows(
+         rows.map((row) =&gt;
+           row.id === id ? { ...row, audioFile: null, s3Path: null } : row
+         )
+       );
+       setUploadStatus((prev) =&gt; {
+         const newStatus = { ...prev };
+         delete newStatus[id];
+         return newStatus;
+       });
+       return;
+     }
+ 
+     try {
+       const backendUrl = process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL;
+       if (!backendUrl) {
+         console.error("BACKEND_URL environment variable is not set");
+         setUploadStatus((prev) =&gt; ({ ...prev, [id]: "error" }));
+         return;
+       }
+ 
+       // Set uploading status
+       setUploadStatus((prev) =&gt; ({ ...prev, [id]: "uploading" }));
+ 
+       // Call presigned URL API
+       const response = await fetch(&#96;${backendUrl}/presigned-url&#96;, {
+         method: "POST",
+         headers: {
+           "Content-Type": "application/json",
+           Authorization: &#96;Bearer ${backendAccessToken}&#96;,
+         },
+         body: JSON.stringify({
+           task_type: "stt",
+           content_type: file.type,
+           extension: file.type.split("/")[1],
+         }),
+       });
+ 
+       if (response.status === 401) {
+         await signOut({ callbackUrl: "/login" });
+         return;
+       }
+ 
+       if (!response.ok) {
+         throw new Error("Failed to get presigned URL");
+       }
+ 
+       const data = await response.json();
+       const presignedUrl = data.presigned_url;
+       const s3Path = data.s3_path;
+ 
+       if (!presignedUrl) {
+         throw new Error("Presigned URL not found in response");
+       }
+ 
+       if (!s3Path) {
+         throw new Error("S3 path not found in response");
+       }
+ 
+       // Upload file to S3 using presigned URL
+       const uploadResponse = await fetch(presignedUrl, {
+         method: "PUT",
+         headers: {
+           "Content-Type": file.type,
+         },
+         body: file,
+       });
+ 
+       if (!uploadResponse.ok) {
+         throw new Error("Failed to upload file to S3");
+       }
+ 
+       // Update the row with the file and S3 path
+       setRows(
+         rows.map((row) =&gt;
+           row.id === id ? { ...row, audioFile: file, s3Path } : row
+         )
+       );
+ 
+       // Set success status
+       setUploadStatus((prev) =&gt; ({ ...prev, [id]: "success" }));
+ 
+       // Clear validation error for this row if file is added
+       setInvalidRowIds((prev) =&gt; {
+         const newSet = new Set(prev);
+         newSet.delete(id);
+         return newSet;
+       });
+     } catch (error) {
+       console.error("Error uploading file:", error);
+       setUploadStatus((prev) =&gt; ({ ...prev, [id]: "error" }));
+     }
+   };
+ 
+   const handleTextChange = (id: string, text: string) =&gt; {
+     setRows(rows.map((row) =&gt; (row.id === id ? { ...row, text } : row)));
+     // Clear validation error for this row if text is entered
+     if (text.trim()) {
+       setInvalidRowIds((prev) =&gt; {
+         const newSet = new Set(prev);
+         newSet.delete(id);
+         return newSet;
+       });
+     }
+   };
+ 
+   const toggleProvider = (provider: string) =&gt; {
+     setSelectedProviders((prev) =&gt; {
+       const newSet = new Set(prev);
+       if (newSet.has(provider)) {
+         newSet.delete(provider);
+       } else {
+         newSet.add(provider);
+       }
+       return newSet;
+     });
+   };
+ 
+   const toggleAllProviders = () =&gt; {
+     if (selectedProviders.size === providerLabels.length) {
+       // Deselect all
+       setSelectedProviders(new Set());
+     } else {
+       // Select all
+       setSelectedProviders(new Set(providerLabels));
+     }
+   };
+ 
+   const handleEvaluate = async () =&gt; {
+     // Validate all rows
+     const invalidIds = new Set&lt;string&gt;();
+     rows.forEach((row) =&gt; {
+       if (!row.audioFile || !row.text.trim() || !row.s3Path) {
+         invalidIds.add(row.id);
+       }
+     });
+ 
+     if (invalidIds.size &gt; 0) {
+       // Highlight invalid rows and switch to input tab
+       setInvalidRowIds(invalidIds);
+       setActiveTab("input");
+       return; // Don't evaluate if validation fails
+     }
+ 
+     // Clear validation errors and proceed with evaluation
+     setInvalidRowIds(new Set());
+     setIsEvaluating(true);
+ 
+     try {
+       const backendUrl = process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL;
+       if (!backendUrl) {
+         console.error("BACKEND_URL environment variable is not set");
+         setIsEvaluating(false);
+         return;
+       }
+ 
+       // Collect audio paths and texts
+       const audioPaths = rows.map((row) =&gt; row.s3Path!);
+       const texts = rows.map((row) =&gt; row.text.trim());
+ 
+       // Map provider labels to their actual values
+       const providers = Array.from(selectedProviders).map((label) =&gt; {
+         const provider = sttProviders.find((p) =&gt; p.label === label);
+         return provider ? provider.value : label;
+       });
+ 
+       // Make API call
+       const response = await fetch(&#96;${backendUrl}/stt/evaluate&#96;, {
+         method: "POST",
+         headers: {
+           "Content-Type": "application/json",
+           accept: "application/json",
+           "ngrok-skip-browser-warning": "true",
+           Authorization: &#96;Bearer ${backendAccessToken}&#96;,
+         },
+         body: JSON.stringify({
+           audio_paths: audioPaths,
+           texts: texts,
+           providers: providers,
+           language: language,
+         }),
+       });
+ 
+       if (response.status === 401) {
+         await signOut({ callbackUrl: "/login" });
+         return;
+       }
+ 
+       if (!response.ok) {
+         throw new Error("Failed to evaluate");
+       }
+ 
+       const result: EvaluationResult = await response.json();
+ 
+       // Redirect to the evaluation detail page
+       if (result.task_id) {
+         router.push(&#96;/stt/${result.task_id}&#96;);
+       }
+     } catch (error) {
+       console.error("Error evaluating:", error);
+       setIsEvaluating(false);
+     }
+   };
+ 
+   const getFileName = (file: File | null) =&gt; {
+     if (!file) return null;
+     return file.name.length &gt; 30
+       ? &#96;${file.name.substring(0, 30)}...&#96;
+       : file.name;
+   };
+ 
+   const isEvaluateDisabled = selectedProviders.size === 0;
+ 
+   return (
+     &lt;div className="space-y-6"&gt;
+       {/* Header with Evaluate Button */}
+       &lt;div className="flex items-center justify-between"&gt;
+         &lt;p className="text-muted-foreground text-[15px] leading-relaxed"&gt;
+           Upload audio files with reference transcriptions to evaluate STT
+           quality across multiple providers
+         &lt;/p&gt;
+         {isEvaluating ? (
+           &lt;div className="flex items-center gap-2 h-9 px-6"&gt;
+             &lt;svg
+               className="w-4 h-4 animate-spin"
+               fill="none"
+               viewBox="0 0 24 24"
+             &gt;
+               &lt;circle
+                 className="opacity-25"
+                 cx="12"
+                 cy="12"
+                 r="10"
+                 stroke="currentColor"
+                 strokeWidth="4"
+               &gt;&lt;/circle&gt;
+               &lt;path
+                 className="opacity-75"
+                 fill="currentColor"
+                 d="M4 12a8 8 0 018-8V0C5.373 0 0 5.373 0 12h4zm2 5.291A7.962 7.962 0 014 12H0c0 3.042 1.135 5.824 3 7.938l3-2.647z"
+               &gt;&lt;/path&gt;
+             &lt;/svg&gt;
+             &lt;span className="text-sm font-medium"&gt;Evaluating...&lt;/span&gt;
+           &lt;/div&gt;
+         ) : (
+           &lt;button
+             onClick={handleEvaluate}
+             disabled={isEvaluateDisabled}
+             className="h-9 px-6 rounded-md text-sm font-medium bg-foreground text-background hover:opacity-90 transition-opacity cursor-pointer disabled:opacity-50 disabled:cursor-not-allowed flex items-center gap-2"
+           &gt;
+             &lt;svg
+               className="w-4 h-4"
+               fill="none"
+               viewBox="0 0 24 24"
+               stroke="currentColor"
+               strokeWidth={2}
+             &gt;
+               &lt;path
+                 strokeLinecap="round"
+                 strokeLinejoin="round"
+                 d="M5.25 5.653c0-.856.917-1.398 1.667-.986l11.54 6.348a1.125 1.125 0 010 1.971l-11.54 6.347a1.125 1.125 0 01-1.667-.986V5.653z"
+               /&gt;
+             &lt;/svg&gt;
+             Evaluate
+           &lt;/button&gt;
+         )}
+       &lt;/div&gt;
+ 
+       {/* Tabs Navigation */}
+       &lt;div className="flex items-center gap-6 border-b border-border"&gt;
+         &lt;button
+           onClick={() =&gt; setActiveTab("settings")}
+           className={&#96;pb-2 text-base font-medium transition-colors cursor-pointer ${
+             activeTab === "settings"
+               ? "text-foreground border-b-2 border-foreground"
+               : "text-muted-foreground hover:text-foreground"
+           }&#96;}
+         &gt;
+           Settings
+         &lt;/button&gt;
+         &lt;button
+           onClick={() =&gt; setActiveTab("input")}
+           className={&#96;pb-2 text-base font-medium transition-colors cursor-pointer ${
+             activeTab === "input"
+               ? "text-foreground border-b-2 border-foreground"
+               : "text-muted-foreground hover:text-foreground"
+           }&#96;}
+         &gt;
+           Input
+         &lt;/button&gt;
+       &lt;/div&gt;
+ 
+       {/* Settings Tab Content */}
+       {activeTab === "settings" &amp;&amp; (
+         &lt;div className="space-y-8"&gt;
+           {/* Language Selection */}
+           &lt;div className="space-y-3"&gt;
+             &lt;div className="flex items-center"&gt;
+               &lt;label className="text-[13px] font-medium text-foreground"&gt;
+                 Language
+               &lt;/label&gt;
+             &lt;/div&gt;
+             &lt;div className="relative w-fit"&gt;
+               &lt;select
+                 value={language}
+                 onChange={(e) =&gt;
+                   setLanguage(e.target.value as "english" | "hindi")
+                 }
+                 className="h-10 px-4 pr-10 rounded-md text-[13px] border border-border bg-background text-foreground focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-accent focus:border-transparent cursor-pointer appearance-none min-w-[140px]"
+               &gt;
+                 &lt;option value="english"&gt;English&lt;/option&gt;
+                 &lt;option value="hindi"&gt;Hindi&lt;/option&gt;
+               &lt;/select&gt;
+               &lt;div className="absolute inset-y-0 right-0 flex items-center pr-3 pointer-events-none"&gt;
+                 &lt;svg
+                   className="w-4 h-4 text-muted-foreground"
+                   fill="none"
+                   viewBox="0 0 24 24"
+                   stroke="currentColor"
+                   strokeWidth={2}
+                 &gt;
+                   &lt;path
+                     strokeLinecap="round"
+                     strokeLinejoin="round"
+                     d="M19.5 8.25l-7.5 7.5-7.5-7.5"
+                   /&gt;
+                 &lt;/svg&gt;
+               &lt;/div&gt;
+             &lt;/div&gt;
+           &lt;/div&gt;
+ 
+           {/* Provider Selection */}
+           &lt;div className="space-y-3"&gt;
+             &lt;div className="flex items-center gap-2"&gt;
+               &lt;h3 className="text-[13px] font-medium text-foreground"&gt;
+                 Select providers to evaluate
+               &lt;/h3&gt;
+               &lt;span className="text-[12px] text-muted-foreground"&gt;
+                 ({selectedProviders.size} selected)
+               &lt;/span&gt;
+               &lt;button
+                 onClick={toggleAllProviders}
+                 className="ml-auto text-[12px] font-medium text-muted-foreground hover:text-foreground transition-colors cursor-pointer"
+               &gt;
+                 {selectedProviders.size === providerLabels.length
+                   ? "Deselect all"
+                   : "Select all"}
+               &lt;/button&gt;
+             &lt;/div&gt;
+             &lt;div className="flex flex-wrap gap-3"&gt;
+               {providerLabels.map((providerLabel) =&gt; {
+                 const isSelected = selectedProviders.has(providerLabel);
+                 return (
+                   &lt;button
+                     key={providerLabel}
+                     onClick={() =&gt; toggleProvider(providerLabel)}
+                     className={&#96;h-9 px-4 rounded-md text-[13px] font-medium border transition-colors cursor-pointer flex items-center gap-2 ${
+                       isSelected
+                         ? "bg-foreground text-background border-foreground"
+                         : "bg-background text-muted-foreground border-border hover:bg-accent/50 hover:text-foreground hover:border-border"
+                     }&#96;}
+                   &gt;
+                     {isSelected &amp;&amp; (
+                       &lt;svg
+                         className="w-4 h-4"
+                         fill="none"
+                         viewBox="0 0 24 24"
+                         stroke="currentColor"
+                         strokeWidth={2}
+                       &gt;
+                         &lt;path
+                           strokeLinecap="round"
+                           strokeLinejoin="round"
+                           d="M4.5 12.75l6 6 9-13.5"
+                         /&gt;
+                       &lt;/svg&gt;
+                     )}
+                     {providerLabel}
+                   &lt;/button&gt;
+                 );
+               })}
+             &lt;/div&gt;
+           &lt;/div&gt;
+         &lt;/div&gt;
+       )}
+ 
+       {/* Input Tab Content */}
+       {activeTab === "input" &amp;&amp; (
+         &lt;div className="space-y-4"&gt;
+           {/* Audio-Text Rows */}
+           {rows.map((row, index) =&gt; {
+             const isInvalid = invalidRowIds.has(row.id);
+             return (
+               &lt;div
+                 key={row.id}
+                 className={&#96;border rounded-xl p-4 flex items-center gap-4 transition-colors ${
+                   isInvalid
+                     ? "border-red-500 bg-red-500/10"
+                     : "border-border bg-muted/10"
+                 }&#96;}
+               &gt;
+                 {/* Row Number */}
+                 &lt;div className="flex-shrink-0 w-8 h-8 rounded-full bg-muted flex items-center justify-center text-[13px] font-medium text-muted-foreground"&gt;
+                   {index + 1}
+                 &lt;/div&gt;
+ 
+                 {/* File Upload Button */}
+                 &lt;div className="flex-shrink-0 flex items-center gap-2"&gt;
+                   &lt;input
+                     type="file"
+                     ref={(el) =&gt; {
+                       fileInputRefs.current[row.id] = el;
+                     }}
+                     accept=".wav,audio/wav,audio/x-wav"
+                     onChange={(e) =&gt; {
+                       const file = e.target.files?.[0] || null;
+                       if (file &amp;&amp; !file.name.toLowerCase().endsWith(".wav")) {
+                         alert("Please select a .wav file only");
+                         e.target.value = ""; // Clear the input
+                         return;
+                       }
+                       handleFileChange(row.id, file);
+                     }}
+                     className="hidden"
+                   /&gt;
+                   &lt;button
+                     onClick={() =&gt; fileInputRefs.current[row.id]?.click()}
+                     disabled={uploadStatus[row.id] === "uploading"}
+                     className="h-10 px-4 rounded-md text-[13px] font-medium border border-border bg-background hover:bg-accent transition-colors flex items-center gap-2 cursor-pointer disabled:opacity-50 disabled:cursor-not-allowed"
+                   &gt;
+                     {uploadStatus[row.id] === "uploading" ? (
+                       &lt;&gt;
+                         &lt;svg
+                           className="w-4 h-4 animate-spin"
+                           fill="none"
+                           viewBox="0 0 24 24"
+                         &gt;
+                           &lt;circle
+                             className="opacity-25"
+                             cx="12"
+                             cy="12"
+                             r="10"
+                             stroke="currentColor"
+                             strokeWidth="4"
+                           &gt;&lt;/circle&gt;
+                           &lt;path
+                             className="opacity-75"
+                             fill="currentColor"
+                             d="M4 12a8 8 0 018-8V0C5.373 0 0 5.373 0 12h4zm2 5.291A7.962 7.962 0 014 12H0c0 3.042 1.135 5.824 3 7.938l3-2.647z"
+                           &gt;&lt;/path&gt;
+                         &lt;/svg&gt;
+                         Uploading...
+                       &lt;/&gt;
+                     ) : (
+                       &lt;&gt;
+                         &lt;svg
+                           className="w-4 h-4"
+                           fill="none"
+                           viewBox="0 0 24 24"
+                           stroke="currentColor"
+                           strokeWidth={1.5}
+                         &gt;
+                           &lt;path
+                             strokeLinecap="round"
+                             strokeLinejoin="round"
+                             d="M3 16.5v2.25A2.25 2.25 0 005.25 21h13.5A2.25 2.25 0 0021 18.75V16.5m-13.5-9L12 3m0 0l4.5 4.5M12 3v13.5"
+                           /&gt;
+                         &lt;/svg&gt;
+                         {row.audioFile
+                           ? getFileName(row.audioFile)
+                           : "Upload audio"}
+                       &lt;/&gt;
+                     )}
+                   &lt;/button&gt;
+                   {uploadStatus[row.id] === "success" &amp;&amp; (
+                     &lt;svg
+                       className="w-5 h-5 text-green-500"
+                       fill="none"
+                       viewBox="0 0 24 24"
+                       stroke="currentColor"
+                       strokeWidth={2}
+                     &gt;
+                       &lt;path
+                         strokeLinecap="round"
+                         strokeLinejoin="round"
+                         d="M9 12.75L11.25 15 15 9.75M21 12a9 9 0 11-18 0 9 9 0 0118 0z"
+                       /&gt;
+                     &lt;/svg&gt;
+                   )}
+                 &lt;/div&gt;
+ 
+                 {/* Text Input */}
+                 &lt;div className="flex-1"&gt;
+                   &lt;input
+                     type="text"
+                     value={row.text}
+                     onChange={(e) =&gt; handleTextChange(row.id, e.target.value)}
+                     placeholder="Enter reference transcription"
+                     className="w-full h-10 px-3 rounded-md text-[13px] border border-border bg-background focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-accent focus:border-transparent"
+                   /&gt;
+                 &lt;/div&gt;
+ 
+                 {/* Delete Button */}
+                 {rows.length &gt; 1 &amp;&amp; (
+                   &lt;button
+                     onClick={() =&gt; setDeleteDialogOpen(row.id)}
+                     className="flex-shrink-0 w-10 h-10 rounded-md text-muted-foreground hover:text-foreground hover:bg-accent transition-colors flex items-center justify-center cursor-pointer"
+                     aria-label="Delete row"

-                       &lt;/td&gt;
-                       &lt;td className="px-4 py-3 text-[13px] text-foreground"&gt;
-                         Higher is better
-                       &lt;/td&gt;

-                         transcript says "9" but the model predicts "nine", both
-                         might be considered correct for the agent's specific use
-                         case. The LLM judge evaluates semantic equivalence
-                         rather than exact string matching.
-                       &lt;/td&gt;
-                       &lt;td className="px-4 py-3 text-[13px] text-foreground"&gt;
-                         Higher is better
-                       &lt;/td&gt;
-                       &lt;td className="px-4 py-3 text-[13px] text-foreground"&gt;

-                       &lt;/td&gt;

-                       &lt;/td&gt;
-                       &lt;td className="px-4 py-3 text-[13px] text-foreground"&gt;

I've updated the `SpeechToTextEvaluation` component to match the layout of `TextToSpeechEvaluation`. Here's a summary of the changes:

## Changes Made

### Layout Changes
- **Added tab navigation** with "Settings" and "Input" tabs (matching TTS)
- **Settings tab** now contains:
  - Language selection dropdown
  - Provider selection with toggle all/deselect all
- **Input tab** now contains:
  - Audio-text rows (upload audio + reference transcription)
  - Add another sample button

### Behavior Changes
- **Evaluate button** is now in the header next to the description (matching TTS)
- **After clicking Evaluate**, the user is redirected to `/stt/${task_id}` to view results on the dedicated detail page
- **Removed inline result display** - no more polling, charts, and tabs on the same page (results are shown on `/stt/[uuid]/page.tsx`)

### Simplified Code
- Removed unused imports (`LeaderboardBarChart`, `DownloadableTable`, `getColorMap`)
- Removed result-related state (`evaluationResult`, `activeTab` for results, `activeProviderTab`)
- Removed polling logic (`pollingIntervalRef`, `pollTaskStatus`)
- Removed scroll-to-bottom effect
- Component is now ~500 lines instead of ~1300 lines

The STT and TTS evaluation workflows are now consistent - both use the same Settings/Input tab layout and redirect to their respective detail pages (`/stt/[uuid]` and `/tts/[uuid]`) after starting an evaluation.

I've updated `.cursor/rules/app-details.md` with the following changes:

1. **Updated "New Page" section** under Evaluation Page Pattern to document that both `TextToSpeechEvaluation` and `SpeechToTextEvaluation` components now use the same tab layout:
   - Settings tab: Language selection + provider selection
   - Input tab: Sample rows + add sample button
   - Evaluate button in header

2. **Updated "Key differences between TTS and STT"** to clarify the Input tab differences:
   - STT: Audio file upload (.wav) + reference transcription
   - TTS: Text input field only

3. **Updated DownloadableTable usage** to reflect that it's used in the detail pages (`/stt/[uuid]`, `/tts/[uuid]`), not in the evaluation form components (since STT no longer shows inline results)
